title: iberis pinnata var. crenata
intro: Iberis pinnata var. crenata, also known as the Alpine Cress or Rock Cress, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a flowering perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Iberis pinnata var. crenata include its ability to alleviate coughs, colds, and fever, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers and leaves can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
